hooks.command: path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$path" ] && exit 0; echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.py$' || exit 0; python3 -m py_compile "$path" 2>&1 && uv run ruff format --quiet "$path" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff check --quiet --fix "$path" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
bash .claude/hooks/code_quality.sh
bash .claude/hooks/ts_quality.sh
bash .claude/hooks/ts_typecheck.sh
bash .claude/hooks/function_complexity_warning.sh
bash .claude/hooks/sdk_lint.sh
bash .claude/hooks/test_coverage.sh
bash .claude/hooks/public_api_test_check.sh

path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$path" ] && exit 0; echo "$path" | grep -qE '/src/.*\.py$' || exit 0; uv run python -c "import agents" 2>&1; rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && { echo 'Import cycle detected — fix circular imports before proceeding' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
bash .claude/hooks/docs_hygiene.sh
bash .claude/hooks/memory_duplication_guard.sh

path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$path" ] && exit 0; echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.py$' || exit 0; result=$(uv run pyright "$path" 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && echo "Pyright: $(echo "$result" | grep -E 'error|warning' | head -5)" >&2; exit 0

path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$path" ] && exit 0; echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.py$' || exit 0; lines=$(wc -l < "$path" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$lines" -gt 400 ] && echo "Warning: $path is $lines lines (>400) — consider splitting" >&2; exit 0
path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.claude/docs/(CHANGELOG\.md|research/|plans/|reviews/)' && touch .claude/.phase_complete; exit 0
bash .claude/hooks/risky_git_guard.sh
bash .claude/hooks/branch_guard.sh

status=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.exitCode // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$status" ] || [ "$status" = "0" ] && exit 0; mkdir -p .claude && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -c --arg rc "$status" '{ts:(now|todate),cmd:.command,rc:$rc}' >> .claude/friction-log.jsonl 2>/dev/null; exit 0

cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'pytest' || exit 0; duration=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.duration // 0' 2>/dev/null); [ "${duration:-0}" -gt 30000 ] 2>/dev/null && osascript -e 'display notification "Tests finished (>30s)" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0

[ -f ".claude/.phase_complete" ] && { rm -f .claude/.phase_complete; printf '{"type":"context","content":"Phase/step complete. Compact if needed before proceeding. Preserve: current position, test count, gotchas, next action."}'; exit 0; }; exit 0
bash .claude/hooks/secrets_scan.sh

cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit' || exit 0; uv run pytest tests/ --tb=short -q 2>&1; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && exit 0; echo 'Tests are failing. Fix them before committing.' >&2; exit 2

cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit' || exit 0; uv lock --check 2>&1; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && exit 0; echo 'uv.lock is out of sync with pyproject.toml — run: uv lock' >&2; exit 2

cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'research-agent|presenter|uv run python -m agents' || exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\-\-dry-run|\-\-max-tokens|\-\-max-pdfs' && exit 0; echo 'Cost reminder: consider --dry-run, --max-tokens, or --max-pdfs for agent commands' >&2; exit 0
cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^pip install|^pip3 install' && { echo 'Use uv, not pip. Run: uv add <package>' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|rm -rf ~|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE TABLE' && { echo 'Blocked: destructive command.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
